name: Data from Information Repositories
description: Detects bulk access to SharePoint, Confluence, or other information repositories
query:
// Detect bulk information repository access
// Trigger on excessive API calls to collaboration platforms
events from proxy
where url matches "(?i)(sharepoint\.com|confluence|wiki|gitlab|github|bitbucket).*/(api|_api|rest)/"
  and method = "GET"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 50
within 300 seconds
